recommendations.title: The Other Man
recommendations.overview: The story of a husband who suspects his wife of adultery, and sets out to track down the other man in her life.

recommendations.title: Notes on a Scandal
recommendations.overview: A veteran high school teacher befriends a younger art teacher, who is having an affair with one of her 15-year-old students. However, her intentions with this new "friend" also go well beyond platonic friendship.

recommendations.title: King Lear
recommendations.overview: An aging King invites disaster, when he abdicates to his corrupt, toadying daughters, and rejects his loving and honest one.

recommendations.title: Iris
recommendations.overview: True story of the lifelong romance between novelist Iris Murdoch and her husband John Bayley, from their student days through her battle with Alzheimer's disease.

recommendations.title: The Children Act
recommendations.overview: In the midst of a marital crisis, a High Court judge must decide if she should order a life-saving blood transfusion for a teen with cancer despite his family's refusal to accept medical treatment for religious reasons.

recommendations.title: The Lives of Others

recommendations.title: Our Idiot Brother
recommendations.overview: Everybody has one—the sibling who is always just a little bit behind the curve when it comes to getting his life together. For sisters Liz, Miranda and Natalie, that person is their perennially upbeat brother, Ned. But as each of their lives begins t

recommendations.title: Victor/Victoria
recommendations.overview: A struggling female soprano finds work playing a male female impersonator, but it complicates her personal life.

recommendations.title: Children of Paradise
recommendations.overview: In a chaotic 19th-century Paris teeming with aristocrats, thieves, psychics, and courtesans, theater mime Baptiste is in love with the mysterious actress Garance. But Garance, in turn, is loved by three other men: pretentious actor Frederick, connivi

recommendations.title: A la mala
